{{Quote|Turn to page 8 and meet my best friend, Han Solo!|Chewbacca, ''Star Wars Kids'' 3 introduction|<ref name="Star Wars Kids 3 (1997)">[[Star Wars Kids (1997) 3|''Star Wars Kids'' (1997) 3]]</ref>}}
'''''Star Wars Kids'' 3''' is the third issue of [[Star Wars Kids (1997)|''Star Wars Kids'']] magazine. It was published by [[Scholastic]] and released in [[November]] [[1997]]. Issue 3 included part three of the serial [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] ''[[The Rebel Thief]]'', written by [[Ryder Windham]].

''Star Wars Kids'' 3 was available exclusively to subscribers of Scholastic's ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]], which arrived as monthly continuity packages via direct mail. Each package included a new ''Star Wars Kids'' magazine issue and the latest ''Star Wars Missions'' adventure book. ''Star Wars Kids'' 3 came packaged with the game's third adventure book, [[Star Wars Missions 3: Attack on Delrakkin|''Attack on Delrakkin'']].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

*'''"[[Who Is That Alien?]] Hutts & Rodians"''' by [[Bill Smith]]
*'''"[[Star Wars Kids Answer Quest]]"'''
*'''"Space Science: Finding Solar Systems"''' by Terry Ray Hiller
*'''"[[The Rebel Thief|''The Rebel Thief, Part 3'']]"''' by [[Ryder Windham]]
*'''"A-maze-ing Universe"'''
*:<small>Help Han Solo navigate the asteroid belt before the TIE fighters get the ''Falcon''!</small>
*'''"''Star Wars Missions'' Bonus Page"'''
*'''"Says Who?"'''
*'''"Brain Blasters"'''
*:<small>...For the ultimate ''Star Wars'' fan.</small>
*'''"Yoda's Puzzle Pages"'''
